title: ilex revoluta
intro: Ilex revoluta, also known as the Chinese holly or evergreen holly, is a type of plant native to China, belonging to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant's leaves and berries have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, offering health benefits like reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
